docs.title: Welcome to the world of data by Mujtaba Rasheed
docs.text: For full list of project and repositories visit: My github repository.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: About Me
docs.text: I am a Python developer at the Heritage Foundation of Pakistan, specializing in data-driven solutions for heritage preservation and research.

docs.title: What I Do
docs.text:
• Build scalable Python applications for heritage documentation and analysis.
  • Work with large datasets from archives, surveys, and research projects.
  • Use libraries such as Pandas, NumPy, SQLAlchemy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and PySpark.
  • Transform raw data into structured, meaningful formats for long-term storage and reporting.

docs.title: My Approach
docs.text:
I focus on:

  • Efficient data ingestion and cleaning pipelines.
  • Analytical workflows that uncover insights from cultural heritage data.
  • Designing storage solutions that keep data organized, accessible, and secure.
  • Automating processes to handle complexity and volume with reliability.

docs.title: Why It Matters
docs.text: By combining Python development with heritage research, I help preserve Pakistan's cultural legacy through careful data management and analysis. My work ensures that valuable information is stored in a structured manner and made useful for future study and decision-making.

docs.title: Project 5
docs.text: Description for Project 5

docs.title: Professional Summary
docs.text: Experienced Data Scientist with a strong background in machine learning, statistical analysis, and data visualization. Proficient in Python, R, SQL, and various data science tools. Passionate about extracting insights from data to drive business decisions.

docs.title: Skills
docs.text:
• Programming: Python, R, SQL
  • Machine Learning: Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Keras
  • Data Visualization: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Tableau
  • Big Data: Hadoop, Spark
  • Statistics: Hypothesis testing, Regression, Time Series Analysis
  • Tools: Jupyter, Git, Docker

docs.title: Senior Data Scientist
docs.text: Company Name, Location January 2020 - Present - Developed predictive models using machine learning algorithms, improving accuracy by 20%. - Analyzed large datasets to identify trends and patterns, leading to cost savings of $500K. - Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement data-driven solutions.

docs.title: Data Analyst
docs.text: Previous Company, Location June 2017 - December 2019 - Performed data cleaning and preprocessing on diverse datasets. - Created dashboards and reports using Tableau for executive decision-making. - Conducted A/B testing to optimize product features.

docs.title: Master of Science in Data Science
docs.text: University Name, Location Graduated: May 2017 - Relevant Coursework: Machine Learning, Big Data Analytics, Statistics

docs.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
docs.text: University Name, Location Graduated: May 2015

docs.title: Certifications
docs.text:
• Certified Data Scientist (CDS), 2021
  • AWS Certified Machine Learning - Specialty, 2020

docs.title: Predictive Analytics for Retail
docs.text: • Built a recommendation system using collaborative filtering, increasing user engagement by 15%.

docs.title: Customer Churn Prediction
docs.text: • Developed a churn prediction model using logistic regression and random forests, achieving 85% accuracy.
